package rulecoverage

func NegativeAllocationChurnInLoop() string {
    ruleID := "allocation_churn_in_loop"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Obvious make, new, or buffer-construction calls inside loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
